'''Maris''' was the name of a boy who traveled alongside an old man claiming to be a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] named [[Jocko]] that [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] helped run an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] blockade with at some point in his past.

As Solo was under the alias of [[Han Solo/Legends|Luke Morgavi]] at the time telling a story about his piloting abilities, pausing before the names, and intentionally reliving his smuggling days, 'Maris' was more likely a fictionalized version of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] rather than a different person.

==Appearances==
